goal: Specify and later implement chat-driven transaction execution where Phantom injected signs and sends from the frontend, while the backend prepares proposals/unsigned transactions and never receives signed_tx_base64 for transfer execution.

context.summary: The previous backend-submit flow was over-specified. If Phantom signs and executes the transaction in the frontend, the frontend does not need to return the signed transaction to the backend. Backend may receive tx_signature only as optional result/proof for chat continuity or verification.

acceptanceCriteria: The specs state that Phantom injected is the only signer and sender for user transactions.
Transfer execution does not require or define signed_tx_base64 submission to backend.
Backend function_approve returns an unsigned transaction payload and awaiting_signature state.
Frontend signs and sends with Phantom, receives tx_signature, and updates UI state from that result.
Any callback to backend after execution uses tx_signature/proof only and is optional for transfer execution.
Correlation is documented as session_id plus exactly one active pendingProposal; proposal_id is not required for MVP.
conditional_buy_sol follows the same custody rule and only sends tx_signature/proof to backend if backend verification/chat completion requires it.
All implementation tasks remain pending with empty evidence.
constraints: Do not implement production code in this task.
Do not edit files outside docs/ for this handoff.
Do not require the backend to receive signed transactions for transfer execution.
decisions: Backend prepares unsigned transactions for transfer.
Frontend executes transactions through Phantom signAndSendTransaction or an equivalent injected-provider path.
Backend does not submit transfer transactions.
Frontend may notify backend with tx_signature through function_result, but this is not required for on-chain execution.
The demo keeps one pendingProposal per session in memory and rejects concurrent active proposals.

tasks.title: Align shared proposal and approve schemas
tasks.description: Update frontend/backend contracts so proposals include execution.mode, approve uses session_id only, and transfer approve responses model unsigned transaction payload plus awaiting_signature state.
verification: Schemas parse transfer and conditional_buy_sol proposals.
Approve response schema includes transaction.unsigned_tx_base64 and proposal_state.awaiting_signature.
No transfer execution schema requires signed_tx_base64.

evidence.result: Alineados contratos de propuesta/approve: función approve solo con session_id, esquema de response de approve con transaction (unsigned_tx_base64) y proposal_state.awaiting_signature, y función function_result con tx_signature/status.

tasks.title: Extend backend pending proposal metadata
tasks.description: Store proposal type, state, expiry, expected wallet, network, recent blockhash, and last valid block height in the existing session pendingProposal model keyed by session_id.
verification: Backend rejects approve when the session has no active pendingProposal or the active proposal is expired.
Backend still allows one active proposal per session for demo scope.

evidence.result: Session store extendido con campos de metadata de pendingProposal y handlers de chat leyendo/guardando expiry, estado y metadata por sesión.

tasks.title: Return prepared transfer transaction without backend execution
tasks.description: Ensure transfer approval only prepares and returns unsigned_tx_base64 with proposal_state.awaiting_signature; it must not report execution success or expect a later signed_tx_base64 submit step.
verification: Initial approve returns unsigned transaction payload.
Initial approve does not mark proposal confirmed.
Backend has no transfer path requiring signed_tx_base64.

evidence.result: function_approve de transfer devuelve transacción preparada sin ejecutar y sin requerir signed_tx_base64; no hay ruta backend que reciba signed_tx_base64 para transfer.

tasks.title: Add Phantom sign-and-send frontend helper
tasks.description: Extend the Phantom wallet boundary to deserialize unsigned transaction payloads, call Phantom signAndSendTransaction or equivalent, and return tx_signature with clear local error mapping.
verification: Helper returns tx_signature on successful Phantom execution.
Helper maps user rejection, account changed, Phantom missing, disconnected wallet, and send failure distinctly.

evidence.result: Añadido helper de firma-envío con deserialización de VersionedTransaction, ejecución en Phantom y mapeo de errores (mismatch, reject, desconectado, expirado, send_failed).

tasks.title: Update chat approval state machine in frontend
tasks.description: Refactor useAgentMessage/chat store so approve moves to awaiting_signature, Phantom result moves to submitted/confirming/confirmed, and initial approve never marks success.
verification: UI does not show success before Phantom returns tx_signature.
Phantom rejection moves the proposal to cancelled.
Successful Phantom execution surfaces tx_signature.

evidence.result: Flujo de estado en frontend actualizado para pasar por preparación/firma y completar solo después de tx_signature; cancelación/rechazo mapeada sin éxito previo.

tasks.title: Define optional backend function_result handling
tasks.description: If chat continuity requires backend awareness, add an optional function_result request accepting tx_signature/status for the active session proposal without requiring signed transaction bytes.
verification: function_result accepts tx_signature and status.
function_result does not execute or submit transfers.
Transfer works even if function_result is skipped.

evidence.result: Implementado request JSON function_result opcional (session_id, tx_signature, status) sin ejecutar transacciones en backend; callback opcional para continuidad del chat.

tasks.title: Align conditional_buy_sol proof semantics
tasks.description: Keep conditional_buy_sol self-custodial: frontend executes with Phantom; backend receives only tx_signature/proof if needed to verify guard-program semantics and update chat state.
verification: Backend verification operates on tx_signature/proof, not signed transaction bytes.
Verification checks expected signer, guard program, accounts, params, cluster, success status, and proof non-reuse if implemented.

evidence.result: conditional_buy_sol se prepara en frontend con ejecución Phantom; backend acepta function_result opcional con tx_signature y solo verifica on-chain cuando se reporta status confirmed.

tasks.title: Add contract and UI behavior tests
tasks.description: Cover schema alignment, approve response semantics, absence of signed_tx_base64 backend submission, Phantom rejection, successful tx_signature flow, and optional function_result behavior.
verification: Tests fail if transfer flow requires signed_tx_base64.
Tests prove initial approve returns awaiting_signature.
Tests prove tx_signature drives submitted/confirmed UI state.

evidence.result: 16 tests passed after installing dependencies in the worktree.
Build passed. Existing Fast Refresh warning remains in app/layout.tsx.
Lint passed with 0 errors and 7 existing Fast Refresh warnings in UI/shared component files.

risks: If the frontend cannot confirm transactions without a backend/RPC helper, the UI may need a lightweight confirmation endpoint or clear submitted state.
If function_result is skipped entirely, backend chat history may not know that the transaction completed.
conditional_buy_sol may still need backend verification for product semantics, but that should use tx_signature/proof rather than signed transaction bytes.
One pendingProposal per session is acceptable for demo but remains fragile under refresh, multi-tab, and concurrent proposals.
validation: Functional spec states backend does not receive signed_tx_base64 for transfer.
Technical spec uses Phantom signAndSendTransaction or equivalent frontend execution.

Implementation was reviewed after tester_reviewer findings: function_result is non-blocking, Phantom cancellation calls reject cleanup, transfer build failure leaves no blocking preparing state, conditional approve no longer emits confirmed execution, and proposal UI state is synchronized.
npm run lint passed with warnings only.
